title: psychotria deplanchei
intro: Psychotria deplanchei is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family, native to New Caledonia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antimalarial, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Psychotria deplanchei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or infused into oil to extract its active compounds.
